creator: mvh@ix.netcom.com
text:
p5-Storable is at .0.7.4 at CPAN and ports has .0.6.11.  I can't use
DBD:Proxy against an Oracle box as the versions are too different.
I tried contacting the maintainer and the mail bounced.

Fix: 

Import new version of p5-Storable from CPAN into ports/devel/p5-Storable.
How-To-Repeat: Check CPAN and the ports
